title: Ore4J
description: Bringing the style of Minecraft: Bedrock Edition's Ore UI into Legacy4J
body:
# Info
This resource pack changes the user interface elements of Legacy4J and Legacy Skins to replicate the style of Minecraft: Bedrock Edition's Ore UI. Ore4J changes a lot of the legacy-style interfaces, including the creative menu, main menu, survival inventory, crafting inventory, change skin menu, etc. This is also an addon for Bare Bones
# Requirements
Ore4J requires [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j). This also works with the [Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins) mod, changing elements of the Skin Selector interface.
> This means you can use Ore4J on modpacks such as:
- [Re-Console](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) by Nostalgica Reverie
- [William's Console: Revisited](https://modrinth.com/modpack/williams-console-revisited) by Nostalgica Reverie/PeacefulWilliam
- [Project4J](https://modrinth.com/modpack/project-4j) by Cixon
